unlock.heading: Your unlock to Senior SA →
unlock.text: Stop waiting to be told. When you're proactively recommending next steps, challenging scope, and creating things the team reuses — you're already operating at the next level. The question your manager will ask: "Is this person making calls on their own?"

title: Senior Solutions Architect
identity: "I shape the deal. I make the team better."

unlock.heading: Your unlock to Advisory SA →
unlock.text: The shift is from doing Advisory-level work occasionally to being the person other SAs bring their hardest problems to. You need at least one domain where you're the regional go-to, and you need to show you can influence a VP or Director without your manager in the room. The question: "Do other SAs call them when they're stuck?"

title: Advisory Solutions Architect
identity: "I unblock the region. Executives call me."

unlock.heading: Your unlock to Principal SA →
unlock.text: Principal isn't about doing more Advisory work — it's about changing how the organisation works. You need to show you've made SAs you've never managed better, influenced the Product roadmap from field signal, and created something (a framework, a white paper, a pattern) that the entire region uses. The question: "Would the region's capability drop structurally if they left tomorrow?"

title: Principal Solutions Architect
identity: "I don't run plays. I write them for everyone."

unlock.heading: At this level there is no ceiling within the SA track.
unlock.text: The move from here is into SA leadership, Product, or Engineering. Your work at Principal SA shapes what MongoDB is capable of as a company — not just as a sales organisation.
